title: live api validation with static artifact/report assertions only
goal: session-57 の live-run で生成される検証テストを、artifacts/session-57/ 配下の静的検証のみに限定し、runtime 再帰や外部 API 呼び出しなしで live execution の成立を確認できるようにする
scope: live run generated validation test design constraints
out_of_scope: external API calls from generated tests
constraints: must not modify existing test files except backend/tests/test_live_api_validation.py
generated test must not invoke orchestration/run_session.py via subprocess
generated test must not invoke pytest recursively
generated test must not call external APIs
generated test must be limited to static assertions on artifacts/session-57/
generated test may only validate file existence, report.json fields, and patches/ content
generated test must not expand scope beyond session-57 artifacts and repository file existence checks
completion_criteria: generated validation test is limited to backend/tests/test_live_api_validation.py only
generated test contains no subprocess invocation of orchestration/run_session.py
generated test contains no recursive pytest invocation
generated test contains no external API calls
generated test validates artifacts/session-57/ using static assertions only
generated test validates report.json status, changed_files, and completion_status fields
generated test validates patches/proposed.patch content for backend/tests/test_live_api_validation.py target
no unintended side effects are introduced

acceptance_criteria.description: generated validation test checks that required session-57 artifact files exist
generated validation test checks report.json fields using static assertions only
generated validation test checks that proposed.patch targets backend/tests/test_live_api_validation.py
generated validation test contains no subprocess invocation, no recursive pytest execution, and no external API calls

review_points: 副作用なし（既存破壊なし）
